name: blog-cover
description: Generate branded blog cover images. 3-concept exploration → user picks → subagent review (optional Codex adversarial pass).
author: Mohamed Sherif

skills.name: blog-cover
skills.description: Generate a branded blog cover image from a markdown post or a free-text prompt. Auto-discovers brand from DESIGN.md/BRAND.md/Tailwind/CSS or runs interactive bootstrap. Renders 3 concepts at 2240x1260, user picks one, optional review pass.
